title: INSERT OR REPLACE with a foreign key constraint leads to assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Bar (Id INT PRIMARY KEY, ParentId INT, C1 TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (ParentId) REFERENCES Bar(Id) ON DELETE SET NULL);
INSERT INTO Bar(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Root');
INSERT INTO Bar(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (2, 1, 'Child 1');
INSERT INTO Bar(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (2, 3, 'Updated Child 1') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ParentId = VALUES(ParentId), C1 = VALUES(C1);
key_bug_features: INSERT OR REPLACE with foreign key constraint
